summary: External merge preflight blocked: Codex /review did not pass: PR #98857 changes `extensions/codex-supervisor/src/config.ts` to convert malformed JSON in `OPENCLAW_CODEX_SUPERVISOR_ENDPOINTS` from a raw `SyntaxError` into a clearer `Error`. LOC: +99/-1 across 2 files. Runtime change is narrow and is the right layer; the blocker is that the added regression proof is not wired into the normal Vitest suite, so the changed behavior is not durably covered by CI. I did not run validation commands; supplied proof already says `pnpm check:changed` and diff checks passed. GitHub/gitcrawl reads were unavailable locally (`GH_TOKEN` missing; `gitcrawl` not installed).
